message:
[HIGH] fcp-host: constant-time admin bearer-token compare

The admin API gate at validate_admin_authorization compared the
presented bearer token against the configured one with `!=`, a
variable-time string compare. A networked attacker who can submit
admin requests can time reject responses to recover the token
byte-by-byte (classic Lucky13-style side channel against secret
equality).

Route the compare through subtle::ConstantTimeEq — the same primitive
fcp-crypto/src/mac.rs uses for MAC verification — and add a regression
test that exercises both same-length and differing-length mismatches
so any future revert that reintroduces `==`/`!=` will be caught.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
